预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 14,363, the 2026 enrollment contraction of about 3.3% (which reduces the ranking number), the slight increase in the number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, and the decrease in the provincial control line (which increases the ranking number); taking into account the expansion effect of the competition base due to the significant drop in the provincial control line, a slight upward adjustment is made, predicting a minimum ranking of about 14,106, with a range of 13,606–14,606.
